headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on UDR, Lowers Price Target to $41
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains UDR (NYSE:UDR) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $42 to $41.

raw.headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on UDR, Lowers Price Target to $41
raw.summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains UDR (NYSE:UDR) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $42 to $41.

headline: Gasoline Prices Aren’t the Only Inflation Threat. Watch Housing Costs.
summary: Economists say distortions tied to the 2025 government shutdown could cause shelter inflation to accelerate in April, complicating the Federal Reserve’s fight against rising prices.

raw.headline: Gasoline Prices Aren’t the Only Inflation Threat. Watch Housing Costs.
raw.summary: Economists say distortions tied to the 2025 government shutdown could cause shelter inflation to accelerate in April, complicating the Federal Reserve’s fight against rising prices.
